title: Nanotechnology
wikitext:
[[File:Senator Armstrong.gif|right|thumb|450px|[[Senator Armstrong]].]]

==Summary==
'''Nanotechnology''' is a branch of technology that focuses on the manipulation of individual atoms and molecules, and is often used to refer to nanorobotics, the theoretical use of extremely small machines that operate on a microscopic level and operate within the bodies of living organisms to perform a wide variety of functions, such as [[Healing|medical treatments]] and the extermination of pathogens. In fiction, nanomachines often have a variety of other functions as well, and may allow the user to [[Hacking|hack]] into or interface with [[Technology Manipulation|technological systems]], [[Body Control|alter their own]] [[Biological Manipulation|biology]], [[Regeneration|regenerate]] from injury, and live [[Longevity|much longer than usual]] or even become [[Immortality|immortal]], among a number of other applications. Some beings may even be composed out of nanomachines.

==Users==
* [[Tsubakura Enraku]] ([[Len'en Project]])
* Many [[Metal Gear]] characters
* YoRHa Androids ([[NieR: Automata]])
* [[Grey Goo]] ([[Tasty Planet]])
